en: I look a dick. No, and I found out tonight.
ko: 아니, 오늘 밤 알게 됐어. 내가 그랬지, 안무를 보라고.

en: I said, look at the choreography. I found that it was an hour.
ko: 그게 한 시간짜리라는 걸 알게 됐어.

en: It was coordinated choreography. They were both doing the same steps.
You can dance. I know you're a great hoofer. You can do it. Dance is my life.
ko: 둘 다 같은 스텝을 밟고 있었어. 넌 춤출 수 있잖아. 네가 훌륭한 댄서인 거 알아. 할 수 있어. 춤은 내 인생이야.

en: But to have it coordinate, I was shocked.
ko: 하지만 그렇게 딱 맞아떨어지는 걸 보고 충격이었어.

en: I was shocked to learn that tonight. You were shocked that he could dance?
ko: 오늘 밤 그걸 알고 정말 놀랐어.

en: No, no, not just dance, Mark.
It's opposite the track that Paula Abdul. It's a higher level of dance.
Now, talking of higher levels, Jason, I've not seen you in a long time.
ko: 이제 더 높은 단계 얘기가 나와서 말인데, 제이슨,

en: And this whole look now that you have gone for, I mean,
ko: 그리고 지금 네가 밀고 있는 이 스타일 말이야,

en: I don't know if you're positioning yourself for the next Bond, but I'm like 100%.
I mean, the hair, the look, talk me through it, because this is a new choice.
ko: 머리며 스타일이며, 어떤 의도인지 좀 말해봐.

en: Yeah, it's flattering. It's so shocking to you. I love it.
ko: 이건 새로운 선택이잖아. 응, 잘 어울리는데 그렇게까지 놀랄 일이야?

en: I'm sitting next to him, and I'm watching a leading man. 100%.
ko: 내가 바로 옆에 앉아 보니까, 진짜 주연 배우 포스야. 백퍼센트.
